title: I Know A Man
content:
I know a man
who photographed the view he saw
from the window of the room where he made love
and not the face of the woman he loved there.
meaning: About: Yehuda Amichai (1924 - September 22, 2000) was an Israeli poet. Amichai is considered by many to be the greatest modern Israeli poet, and was one of the first to write in colloquial Hebrew.
